event: Studies of a scholar in interior settings
description: A monochrome ink-wash sketchbook page divided into two vignettes. The upper scene shows a man seated at a desk in a darkened interior, holding or reading a large book, with various objects and possibly artwork visible on the wall behind him. The lower scene shows a figure seated near a Gothic arched window in what appears to be a stone interior with stairs. Both scenes are rendered in loose, atmospheric washes of grey and black, creating dramatic contrasts of light and shadow.
